description: The CT Cranium DICOM dataset is loaded in InVesalius 3. Document the Maximum Cranial Length (anterior-to-posterior) and Maximum Cranial Breadth (left-to-right) for a forensic report. Record these measurements in millimeters in a text file at /home/ga/Documents/cranial_report.txt and save the project to /home/ga/Documents/forensic_cranium.inv3.
